ciphers.text: the stranger — character not yet identified in prose by canonical name
ciphers.encoding_hint: appears in vol5_ch0_booth6 as 'the stranger' carrying the demon. Name reveal would be a major story beat. Watch for proper name introduction in later chapters.
booth 6 is the scene title's reference. The number 6 = LOVERS arcana. The stranger inhabits the LOVERS position in the diner, possibly foreshadowing his chapter.

ciphers.text: the demon (portrait_the_demon) sits closest to him
ciphers.encoding_hint: stranger is the demon's mortal interface. The portrait_the_demon piece animates more aggressively when stranger is in-scene.
